column2: §M(ED:MP)§!
§M(ED:MP)§! Player NAP
Offer a non-aggression pact to another human player
§Y[Root.GetTitledFirstName]§! is NOT currently considering a §YPlayer NAP Offer§! from §Y[From.GetTitledFirstName]§!
§Y[From.GetTitledFirstName]§! is NOT currently considering a §YPlayer NAP Offer§! from §Y[Root.GetTitledFirstName]§!
Has NOT rejected a §YPlayer NAP Offer§! from §Y[From.GetTitledFirstName]§! in the §Yprevious 5 years§!
Both §Y[Root.GetTitledFirstName]§! and §Y[From.GetTitledFirstName]§! have recently rejected each others' §YPlayer NAP Offers§!

Is an §YAdministrator§! in §Ysingle-player§! and in §R!!!DEBUG MODE!!!§!
§gINFO:§!
§b.....§g- Debug mode options are controlled via global flags (ie. console "set_flag" & "clr_flag")§!
§b.....§g- "edmp_player_nap_debug" = master flag to enable/disable all debugging§!
§b.....§g- "edmp_player_nap_debug_force_fail" = force the passthrough event to fail§!
§b.....§g- "edmp_player_nap_debug_force_delay" = letters will be sent tomorrow or later (not today)§!
§b.....§g- "edmp_player_nap_debug_force_no_ignore_delay" = AI ignore responses are NOT delayed§!
§b.....§g- "edmp_player_nap_debug_force_ignore" / "..._accept" / "..._reject"§!
§b..........§g= AI characters automatically ignore/accept/reject the offer (only use one of these!)§!
§b.....§g- Don't forget to clear all of these flags before saving!§!
§b.§!
Receives a §YPlayer NAP Offer§!
§M(ED:MP)§! Non-aggression pact between players
§M(ED:MP)§! Non-aggression pact agreed between players
(ED:MP) Player NAP Offer

To the [GetFromRootCompliment] [Root.GetBestName],

I believe our realms have much in common. So, in order to prevent any hurtful hostilities, I suggest we enter into a formal non-aggression pact.

With my deepest respect,
[edmp_pnap_sender.GetBestName]
Ignore
Accept
Reject
[edmp_pnap_sender.GetBestName] will eventually be §Ynotified§! of your lack of response
Send a letter to [edmp_pnap_sender.GetBestName] informing [edmp_pnap_sender.GetHerHim] that we §Gaccept§! [edmp_pnap_sender.GetHerHis] offer
Send a letter to [edmp_pnap_sender.GetBestName] informing [edmp_pnap_sender.GetHerHim] that we §Rreject§! [edmp_pnap_sender.GetHerHis] offer
A §Ynon-aggression pact§! is created between §Y[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetTitledFirstName]§! and §Y[edmp_pnap_sender.GetTitledFirstName]§!
§Y[edmp_pnap_sender.GetTitledFirstName]§! will be §Rblocked§! from sending you any §YPlayer NAP offers§! for §Y5 years§!
(ED:MP) Player NAP Ignored

My liege,

Several months have passed since we sent our generous non-aggression pact offer to [edmp_pnap_recipient.GetBestName], and we have not received any response. It appears that our generous offer has been lost enroute.

With my deepest respect,
[edmp_pnap_ignore_letter_event_sender.GetBestName]
OK
§YNo change§! in the relationship between §Y[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetTitledFirstName]§! and §Y[edmp_pnap_sender.GetTitledFirstName]§!
(ED:MP) Player NAP Accepted

To the [GetFromRootCompliment] [Root.GetBestName],

I graciously accept your generous offer of a non-aggression pact. May our realms prosper in mutual peace and harmony!

With my deepest respect,
[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetBestName]
Excellent!
A §Ynon-aggression pact§! has been created between §Y[edmp_pnap_sender.GetTitledFirstName]§! and §Y[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetTitledFirstName]§!
(ED:MP) Player NAP Rejected

To the [GetFromRootCompliment] [Root.GetBestName],

I reject your offer of a non-aggression pact - there simply is not enough trust between our realms to justify it at this time.

With my deepest respect,
[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetBestName]
Curses!
You will be §Rblocked§! from sending §YPlayer NAP offers§! to §Y[edmp_pnap_recipient.GetTitledFirstName]§! for §Y5 years§!
(ED:MP) !!Player NAP ERROR!!

An unexpected error has occurred when trying to set up a Player NAP!

Scopes at time of error(for debugging):
- Root = [edmp_pnap_error_root.GetBestName] ([edmp_pnap_error_root.GetID])
- Root_From = [edmp_pnap_error_rootfrom.GetBestName] ([edmp_pnap_error_rootfrom.GetID])
- Root_FromFrom = [edmp_pnap_error_rootfromfrom.GetBestName] ([edmp_pnap_error_rootfromfrom.GetID])
- Sender = [edmp_pnap_sender.GetBestName] ([edmp_pnap_sender.GetID])
- Recipient = [edmp_pnap_recipient.GetBestName] ([edmp_pnap_recipient.GetID])
OK
